description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build & Publish docker image for PyNE-CI that builds and publishes Docker images for various stages to ghcr.io. The workflow triggers on manual dispatch, pull requests to specific paths, and pushes to specific paths. It uses a matrix strategy to build images with different package managers, HDF5 configurations, and test bases. The workflow logs in to the Container registry, builds and tests the images using a multistage Docker build action, and pushes the images to ghcr.io with tags like latest and stable.
